augmented with the user's configured model from ~/.claude/settings.json.

get.description:
Generic proxy endpoint that forwards requests to any URL.
This bypasses CORS restrictions by making requests server-side.

Query Parameters:
- url: The target URL to proxy to (required)
- method: HTTP method to use (GET or POST, optional - defaults to actual method)

For GET requests: All other query params are forwarded as query string parameters
For POST requests: Body should be JSON with optional 'body' and 'headers' fields

parameters.name: url

schema.description: Target URL to proxy request to
schema.title: Url

parameters.description: Target URL to proxy request to

parameters.name: method

schema.description: HTTP method (GET or POST, defaults to request method)
schema.title: Method

parameters.description: HTTP method (GET or POST, defaults to request method)

multi_select.title: Multi Select
multi_select.description: Set True to allow multiple values for the parameter.

split_param_on_citation.description: Set True to split the each parameter value into a separate citation. Only works if `multi_select` is True.

options.title: Options
options.description: Optional list of values for enumerations.

get_options.description: Set True to get options for the parameter dynamically. Requires an `optionsEndpoint` definition for the data source.
